# unlux · Lakshay Choudhary

> Personal site of Lakshay Choudhary (unlux), a full-stack developer focused on backend-heavy products, cloud infrastructure, and systems that stay maintainable after v1 ships. Works mostly with Next.js, TypeScript, Prisma, Redis, AWS, GCP, and Linux/NixOS.

Currently a Full Stack Developer at Skillion (full-time) and The Joy Junction (part-time).

## Pages

- [Home](https://unlux.dev/): bio, work experience, and live Discord/Spotify status
- [Writing](https://unlux.dev/blog): posts on backend systems, tooling, and personal experiments
- [Todo](https://unlux.dev/todo): a public slice of the working queue, synced from Notion
- [Reading](https://unlux.dev/currently-reading): books, articles, and technical rabbit holes

## Feeds

- [RSS](https://unlux.dev/rss)
- [Sitemap](https://unlux.dev/sitemap.xml)
